mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_messages (msg_type, from_user_id, to_user_id, group_id, body) VALUES (#{msgType}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{groupId}, #{body})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.msg_type, m.from_user_id, m.to_user_id, m.group_id, m.body, m.created_at FROM im_messages m INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS mid FROM im_messages WHERE msg_type = 'P2P' AND (from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN to_user_id ELSE from_user_id END ) t ON m.id = t.mid ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.msg_type, m.from_user_id, m.to_user_id, m.group_id, m.body, m.created_at FROM im_messages m INNER JOIN ( SELECT group_id, MAX(id) AS mid FROM im_messages WHERE msg_type = 'GROUP' GROUP BY group_id ) t ON m.id = t.mid AND m.group_id = t.group_id WHERE m.group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM im_group_members WHERE user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
